rationale: NL-to-SQL requires parsing intent, generating safe SQL, and maintaining conversation context — moderate reasoning.
Weekly rollup with pattern recognition and saved-query suggestions needs editorial synthesis, not just aggregation.
Event classification into fixed categories + threshold alerting is rule-based and deterministic.
Threshold-based escalation on accumulated signals — clear rules, no synthesis or nuanced judgment.
Generating CRO variant hypotheses for underperforming pages + always-review gate demands high creative/analytical judgment.
Weighted decision matrix with kill criteria is high-stakes strategic analysis requiring deep multi-factor reasoning.
Generating 5-8 data-grounded optimization proposals with human gate requires strategic synthesis and quality output.
Combining in-flight CRO data, results, and proposals into a weekly briefing needs editorial judgment but is templated.
Distributing a pre-composed briefing to messaging + KB is mechanical delivery with no synthesis.
Threshold-triggered alert formatting and routing to messaging channel — deterministic dispatch.
Aggregating enrichment metrics and picking top-3 prospects by score is mechanical ranking and formatting.
Real-time churn/expansion threshold alerts + personalized email outreach requires tone and context judgment.
3-tier dunning sequence with mid-sequence reversal handling needs conditional logic and persuasive tone judgment.
Escalating dunning with reversal + cancellation handling is multi-branch conditional flow with tone sensitivity.
Counting and formatting auto-resolved/escalated/stale ticket metrics into a digest is purely aggregation.
Sentiment-routed stale issue classification + auto-resolution vs escalation decisions need moderate judgment.
Composing a comprehensive report with WoW trends and KB growth analysis requires data synthesis and editorial work.
Root-cause analysis of CI failures requires diagnostic reasoning, though output is structured messaging layout.
Ranking flaky tests with trend context needs pattern analysis and editorial framing, not just sorting.
Creating/updating a bot comment on a PR keyed by number is a mechanical upsert operation.
Verifying and refreshing a context map is a deterministic validation and data-refresh task.
Four-dimension scoring per context group with actionable idea creation requires analytical judgment across dimensions.
Composing and delivering a monthly health report with snapshot appending requires synthesis and editorial framing.
Label-driven type/priority mapping to create/update Linear tickets is rule-based field mapping.
Formatting a batched handoff summary with links into a messaging layout is templated, mechanical work.
Version polling + component diff emission is deterministic detection with no synthesis.
Scanning codebase for backlog candidates requires pattern recognition and candidate evaluation judgment.
End-to-end PR lifecycle with code changes, review-comment reactions, and always-review gate is high-stakes dev work.
Release candidate bundling + human approval gate needs coordination judgment but follows a defined process.
Label-driven GitHub↔Jira sync with type/priority mapping is deterministic field translation.
PR→Jira sync + messaging notification + oversized PR review gate mixes routing rules with threshold judgment.
Mapping a release to Jira version + fixVersion + changelog is structured field mapping and formatting.
Per-owner email composition + commitment ledger + escalation routing requires tone and prioritization judgment.
Aggregating doc health stats into a weekly team digest is mechanical metric formatting.
Per-page staleness tier classification + link validation is rule-based scoring with no synthesis.
Winner detection + summary + rollout ticket creation requires statistical interpretation and editorial judgment.
Near-real-time flag change detection + messaging notification is deterministic event dispatch.
Tiered stale-flag escalation with running-experiment exclusion needs contextual classification logic.
